title_descriptor: Pa6.6 woven fabric for Military wear and bag
page_title: Pa6.6 woven fabric for Military wear and bag - ArDura 500 - Ariteks
spec_line: 240 g/m², 100% Pa 6.6, Water Repellent, Waterproof, Woven Fabric
description_blocks: ArDura 500 is lightweight 100% polyamide 6.6 woven fabric for military wear and equippments.
It is EN ISO EN343 certified for waterproof
It's used mostly for application which requires ultra durability and water resistance.

technical_documents.label: >> ArDura 500 Data Sheet
technical_documents.context_text: Technical Parameters Fiber 100% Polyamide 6.6 (PA 6.6) EN ISO 2076 Yarn 500 Denier EN ISO 2060 Weight 240 ±10 g/m² EN ISO 3081 Width 1500 ±20 mm EN ISO 3932 Tensile Strength Warp>3000N; Weft>2000N EN ISO 13934-1 Tear Strength Warp>250N; Weft>200N EN ISO 13937-4 Dimensional Change -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% EN ISO 5077 Abrasion Resistance @50000 TS EN 530 Rubbing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X12 Perspiration Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 E04 Washing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 C06 Dry Cleaning Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 D01 Hypochlorite Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 N01 Hot Press Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X11 Light Fastness 4 EN ISO 105 B02 pH 6.0 EN ISO 3071 Azo Test No Azo Colorants EN ISO 14362-1 Application Miltary Equippments Quality Management Done ISO 9001 Spray Test ISO 5 EN ISO 24920 Waterproof Yes EN ISO 343 Water resistance >1000mm H 2 0 EN ISO 20811 Technical Documents >> ArDura 500 Data Sheet Certificates

High Tenacity Polyamide Fabrics (PA6.6) for Military bags, motorcyclist clothing and workwear fabrics. Pa6.6 fabrics has high tenacity and friction resistance.
240 g/m² , 100% Pa 6.6, Water Repellent, Waterproof, Woven Fabric

ArDura 500 is lightweight 100% polyamide 6.6 woven fabric for military wear and equippments. It is EN ISO EN343 certified for waterproof It's used mostly for application which requires ultra durability and water resistance. Technical Parameters Fiber 100% Polyamide 6.6 (PA 6.6) EN ISO 2076 Yarn 500 Denier EN ISO 2060 Weight 240 ±10 g/m² EN ISO 3081 Width 1500 ±20 mm EN ISO 3932 Tensile Strength Warp>3000N; Weft>2000N EN ISO 13934-1 Tear Strength Warp>250N; Weft>200N EN ISO 13937-4 Dimensional Change -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% EN ISO 5077 Abrasion Resistance @50000 TS EN 530 Rubbing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X12 Perspiration Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 E04 Washing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 C06 Dry Cleaning Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 D01 Hypochlorite Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 N01 Hot Press Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X11 Light Fastness 4 EN ISO 105 B02 pH 6.0 EN ISO 3071 Azo Test No Azo Colorants EN ISO 14362-1 Application Miltary Equippments Quality Management Done ISO 9001 Spray Test ISO 5 EN ISO 24920 Waterproof Yes EN ISO 343 Water resistance >1000mm H 2 0 EN ISO 20811 Technical Documents >> ArDura 500 Data Sheet Certificates
